name: Cheese and Potato Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and boil until tender.
2. Mash the potatoes and let them cool.
3. Add the egg, salt, cottage cheese, flour, and nutmeg to the mashed potatoes. Mix well.
4. Knead lightly until the mixture is smooth.
5. Shape the dough into a long thick roll and cut into 1-inch pieces.
6. Roll each piece into dumplings.
7. Cook the dumplings in rapidly boiling salted water until they rise to the surface, about 5-7 minutes longer or until cooked through.
8. Drain the dumplings and pour melted butter over them.
